features.title: Browser-First E2E
features.description: Rewrite apps/web/e2e/phase2-board.spec.ts so the happy-path test drives login, goal-space creation, and node-board creation through the existing browser UIs (P3-01 / P3-02 / P3-03) instead of pre-creating those rows through direct API calls in beforeAll.
acceptance_criteria: Feature only rewrites apps/web/e2e/phase2-board.spec.ts and updates the seeded-user helper.
No backend, API, database, schema, migration, or product UI changes are made.
apps/web/e2e/global-setup.ts is unchanged (still applies migrations only).
phase2-board.spec.ts no longer calls apiCreateGoalSpace or apiCreateNodeBoard.
beforeAll no longer pre-creates a goal space or a node board.
beforeAll no longer pre-creates a card; the test creates its own card via the command palette.
seedUser writes a real scrypt hash for e2e-password produced by hashPassword from apps/web/src/lib/auth/password.ts.
The test visits /login, fills Email with SEEDED_USER_EMAIL, fills Password with e2e-password, clicks Sign in, and waits for URL match /goal-spaces$.
The test fills Goal name with P3 browser beta, fills Description, clicks Create goal space, waits for a link matching the goal name, and clicks through to the detail page.
The test fills Board key with MAIN, fills Board name, clicks Create node board, and waits for getByTestId(lane-backlog) to be visible.
The test issues /create-card E2E verification card via the command palette and waits for a button matching the title.
The test obtains the created card's id via the intercepted POST /api/v1/goal-spaces/{id}/cards response and uses it for /execute <cardId>.
The test asserts an audit row appears without manual refresh.
The test asserts getByTestId(lane-backlog) remains visible after the execute round-trip.
afterAll cancels the goal space using the id obtained from the UI flow.
pnpm --filter @keplar/web lint exits 0 with no new errors.
dependencies: P3-03 CreateNodeBoardForm in GoalSpaceShell empty branch
test_needs: Focused Playwright happy-path run via pnpm --filter @keplar/web e2e
Sanity runs of P3-01/P3-02/P3-03 focused unit tests to confirm forms are wired
Requested lint, typecheck, format, and diff checks
definition_of_done: Required tests pass or documented exceptions are recorded
Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions
